meta.note: Copy this file to resume.json and fill in your real data. resume.json is gitignored.

summary.hero: 2-3 sentence version of your summary for the hero section. Punchy, positioning-focused.
summary.full: Full professional summary paragraph used in the AI agent context and the resume content section.

experience.companyDescription: One sentence describing what the company does
experience.title: Your Title
bullets: Achievement or responsibility, written with impact and specifics.
Second bullet. Include metrics where possible.

projects.title: Project Name
projects.description: One sentence description for card display.
bullets: Detailed bullet about what was built or accomplished.
